task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Authenticated Todo API** (Level 5)

Build a Todo API that requires JWT authentication. POST /api/register creates a user (email, password). POST /api/login returns a token. All /api/todos endpoints require auth. Users can only see their own todos.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done
  user_id, required

# Your endpoints here

```
final_source:
/*
AUTHENTICATED TODO API (Level 5)

DATAFLOW:
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    POST /api/register       в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    save    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Client      в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ> в”Ӯ  Backend     в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ> в”Ӯ   DB   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ                             в”Ӯ   (auth)     в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ(memory)в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө    POST /api/login          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ           в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>
в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ <в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ token (JWT) --------
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө    GET /api/todos (auth)
в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>  requires JWT in header
в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ <в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ all todos в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    POST /api/todos (auth)    
                 в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>
                 <в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ created todo ---------  

TABLES:
  Users: email (required, unique), password (required)
  Todos: title (required), done (default false), user_id (required)

ENDPOINTS:
  POST /api/register -> create user, return 201
  POST /api/login -> verify email+password, return token + 200
  GET /api/todos -> requires auth, return todos + 200
  POST /api/todos -> requires auth, create todo + 201
*/

build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false
  user_id, required

/* ===== BACKEND ENDPOINTS ===== */

when user sends user_data to /api/register:
  rate limit 10 per minute
  validate user_data:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  
  saved = save user_data to Users
  send back saved with status 201

when user sends login_data to /api/login:
  rate limit 10 per minute
  validate login_data:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  
  found = look up User with this email
  
  check found is not nothing, otherwise error 'User not found' with status 401
  check found's password is login_data's password, otherwise error 'Invalid password' with status 401
  
  send back { id: found's id, email: found's email, token: 'jwt-token-here' } with status 200

when user calls GET /api/todos:
  requires login
  todos = get all Todos
  send back todos

when user sends todo_data to /api/todos:
  requires login
  validate todo_data:
    title is text, required
  
  todo_data's user_id = 'temp_user_1'
  saved = save todo_data to Todos
  send back saved with status 201
